title: habenaria propinquior
intro: Habenaria propinquior, also known as the small yellow orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Habenaria propinquior include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a valuable natural remedy. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the roots and stems in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment for topical application.
